description: Product description WATELL Double Sided Nail Brush for Every Day Use - 2 different kinds of Nail Brushes with Plastic Handle For Cleaning Nails - Easy to Use Brushes - Nail Cleaning Scrubbing Brush for Hands Feet Nails Directions 1. Wet the brush with water. 2. Apply mild soap or nail cleanser to the bristles. 3. Gently scrub the nails and surrounding skin. 4. Rinse the brush and nails thoroughly. 5. Pat nails dry with a towel. 6. Repeat as needed.
